<phase_context spec_id="S0000001a" task_id="T0000001a" phase="execute" iteration="2">

<phase_context_stable>
<spec_contract>
    scope: Add token-bucket rate limiting middleware to all /api routes
    workspace: /repo/api
    base_branch: main
    exclusions:
      - frontend changes
      - auth changes
</spec_contract>

<decisions_stable>
  <decision index="1" id="D0000001a" origin="authored">
    title: Use TOML for all config
    summary: Specs / phases / pipelines / config all TOML.
    rationale: Single parser; LLMs never parse these.
    alternatives_rejected:
      - YAML — Whitespace fragility, 3 quoting styles
      - KDL — Immature ecosystem
  </decision>
</decisions_stable>
</phase_context_stable>

<phase_context_volatile>
<decisions_runtime>
  <decision index="1" id="D0000002b" origin="runtime" phase="execute">
    title: Sliding-window algorithm for token bucket
    summary: Use sliding-window over fixed-window for rate limiting.
    rationale: Avoids burst spikes at window boundaries.
    alternatives_rejected:
      - Fixed window — Burst spike at boundary
      - Leaky bucket — Wrong shape for bursty allowance
  </decision>
</decisions_runtime>

<prior_phase_runs>
  <run index="1" id="P0000001a" phase="execute" iteration="1" outcome="fail" completed="2026-05-17T03:14Z">
    synopsis: Attempted to implement token_bucket but hit a type error in the middleware chain.
    error: type-mismatch in middleware chain
    why: axum 0.7 changed the middleware trait signature
    fix: use axum::middleware::from_fn_with_state or pin the Body type
    files_touched: src/middleware/token_bucket.rs
    decisions_made: D0000002b
  </run>
</prior_phase_runs>

<task_contract>
    behavior: Create token_bucket middleware module
    verifications:
      - Unit tests pass for new middleware::token_bucket module
      - cargo clippy -- -D warnings -p api
</task_contract>
</phase_context_volatile>

</phase_context>
